posts.text:
I will not be supporting Senator Mullin’s nomination to be the next Secretary of Homeland Security.

The problems at DHS, especially at ICE and CBP, run far deeper than just who is in charge.

Americans need a change in DHS POLICY. We demand legislation to rein in ICE and end the violence.

Trump started a war in the Middle East, but now he is trying to dodge the cost and leave the American people with the bill, and there are no signs this war is going to end anytime soon.

Secretary Rubio and Secretary Hegseth need to testify publicly under oath.

The American people deserve answers. They deserve accountability.

HAPPENING NOW: Senate Democrats will try AGAIN to pay our TSA workers amidst the Republican DHS shutdown.
 
Democrats will try to pass by unanimous consent – for the FOURTH time – a funding bill for TSA. Republicans have a simple choice: will they pay our critical workers and reduce wait times for flyers, or will they continue to block this funding?

Republicans could focus on so many issues Americans actually care about—like the price of groceries and gas.

Instead, they have chosen to focus on voter suppression.

Democrats will fight Republican’s SAVE Act until the end.

Video

BREAKING: DYLAN CONTRERAS IS COMING HOME! 

He will soon be back in NY, reunited with his mother Raiza, his family, and the Bronx community that loves him. 
 
I sat with Raiza as she cried in my office the night of the State of the Union and told her I would do everything in my power to help bring her son home, and I am thrilled they will be together once again.
 
There are so many families like Dylan’s that have been torn apart by the Trump administration – this chaos at the hands of ICE must e

House Republicans: “Working people don’t pay enough taxes.” 
 
Truly the most out of touch people on the planet.


Acyn (@Acyn)

Foxx: One of our colleagues just talked about the fact that wealthy people pay small percentages of their income on taxes. But what he didn't say is they pay over 50% of all the taxes paid in this country, and that working class people don't pay nearly as much as they do.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/Acyn/status/2033953685517308023#m

Today, @SenatorHeinrich, @SenWhitehouse, and I released the latest report in my “Trump’s Broken Promises Series,” Trump’s Broken Promise to Lower Your Energy Bills. 

You can read it here: democrats.senate.gov/imo/med…

Donald Trump promised to cut the price of energy in half in his first year.

The opposite has happened.

Donald Trump has systematically destroyed investments in energy production, favored big oil over working families and raised costs on households by killing new energy projects. And the American people are paying the price.

Senate Democrats will NOT allow the SAVE Act to pass through the Senate, no matter how long it takes. That’s because the SAVE Act:

1. Purges millions of Americans from voter rolls
2. Kills online, mail, and motor voter registration.
3. Rejects commons IDs to register to vote.
4. Forces Americans to register in person.
5. Penalizes married women who changed their last names.

Hassett really said this out loud. On live television.

It’s almost unbelievable until you remember they are both the dumbest and cruelest among us.


Aaron Rupar (@atrupar)

Hassett: "If the war were to be extended, it wouldn't really disrupt the US economy very much at all. It would hurt consumers, and we'd have to think about what we'd have to do about that, but that's really the last of our concerns right now."

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/atrupar/status/2033874187874390372#m

BREAKING: The MTA has just filed a lawsuit to reclaim the money that the Trump Administration is illegally blocking for the Second Avenue Subway expansion.
 
@RepEspaillat and I secured $3.4 billion for the Second Avenue Subway through the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law. East Harlem has waited over a hundred years for this line. These projects are not political bargaining chips, they are lifelines for New York’s economy and union workers, and we will fight until every dollar of promised funding i

This is a win for science and medicine and a loss for Trump and RFK Jr.

Vaccines are safe and effective lifesaving tools. RFK Jr. is a stain on public health and I’m glad the courts ruled against his anti-vaccine madness.

I’m monitoring the fire near the start of the St Patrick’s Day Parade on 43rd Street and 5th Avenue, a few blocks from my New York City office.
 
Thank you to the @FDNY for their quick response and to all the first responders for working as swiftly as possible to put the fire out. Please stay safe as you celebrate St. Patrick’s Day today, New York!


FDNY (@FDNY)

The FDNY is operating at a fire on East 43rd Street in Manhattan.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/FDNY/status/2033910556139135130

As this war with Iran sends gas prices higher, Donald Trump is making things worse by killing hundreds of clean energy projects across the country. 

All because he thinks they ruin the view from his fancy golf courses.
Trump promised to cut people's electricity bills in half by the end of his first year in office. Instead, they've risen by almost triple the rate of inflation.

Donald Trump says he’s hoping China will help us clear the Strait of Hormuz. Are you kidding me?

Donald Trump created a mess in the Middle East, and he clearly has no plan for how to end it.

Not a single Senate Democrat will support the SAVE Act. Not this week. Not next week. Not ever. 
 
We will oppose it on the floor as long as it takes.

I will lead Senate Democrats in blocking the SAVE Act this week no matter what it takes. 
 
Why? The SAVE Act:
 
1. Prevents millions of American citizens from voting by requiring birth certificate or passport to vote
2. Decimates vote-by-mail
3. Forces Americans to register to vote in person
4. Let’s Trump purge whomever he wants from the voter rolls
